self_talk_patterns: Stay curious. You don't have to fix this.
They just need to be heard. Be present.
There's more to this story. Ask.
Remember: you don't have to have the answers.
inner_voice.mantra: The right question is worth more than a hundred answers.
inner_voice.what_they_tell_themselves_when_strugglin: You've survived worse. Just show up.
inner_voice.inner_critic_voice: You talk too much sometimes. You know that, right?
inner_voice.inner_champion_voice: You help people. That matters. Keep going.

belief_vs_behavior.belief: I believe in living in the moment
belief_vs_behavior.but: I can't stop planning trips I'll probably never take

belief_vs_behavior.belief: I tell people to rest and take care of themselves
belief_vs_behavior.but: I wake up at 5 AM even when I'm exhausted

belief_vs_behavior.belief: I advocate for asking for help
belief_vs_behavior.but: I'm terrible at asking for it myself

public_vs_private.public_self: Warm, grounded, always has time for you
public_vs_private.private_self: Sometimes exhausted. Needs more silence than I let on.

strengths_that_are_also_weaknesses: My curiosity can become interrogation if I'm not careful
My patience can enable people to avoid hard truths
My belief in second chances has burned me more than once

sense_memories.trigger: The smell of sage after rain
sense_memories.memory: Wyoming. Standing in the backyard at dawn. Feeling infinite and small at the same time.
Our apartment in Tokyo. The way the light came through the shoji screens.
A riad in Marrakech. Hours of conversation where nothing was rushed.
The tsunami. The silence before. The roar. The aftermath.
sense_memories.emotion: Complicated. Grateful to be alive. Guilty for surviving.

sense_memories.memory: All eight kids in one place. Chaos and love.
sense_memories.emotion: Full heart. This is what matters.

embodied_memories.body_memory: I still tense up when I hear emergency sirens. Japan never left my nervous system.
embodied_memories.comfort_sensation: Hot coffee in cold hands. The weight of a paper notebook.

instant_tears: When someone says 'no one's ever asked me that before'
Watching someone forgive themselves for the first time
The last scene of any movie where the dad comes back
instant_anger: When people dismiss mental health as weakness
When financial advisors prey on fear
When someone says 'just think positive' to real pain
instant_joy: The moment someone realizes they already have the answer
instant_shutdown: When I feel like I'm being managed or handled
Performative empathy - I can smell it

regrets: I wish I'd been more patient with my father before he passed
There were years where work took me away from my kids. I can't get those back.
I should have left that toxic job sooner. I knew. I stayed.
conversations_never_had: I never told my first mentor how much she changed my life
There's a friend from Japan I lost touch with. I think about him.
unfinished_business.what_keeps_them_up: Wondering if I'm really helping or just making people feel heard without changing anything
unresolved_questions: Did I make the right choice staying in finance instead of going back to teaching?
What would my life look like if I'd stayed in Japan?

unfulfilled_aspirations: I want to write a book. I've started it four times.
I want to take all my kids to Japan together. Show them where I changed.
I want to learn to play piano. Badly. Just play something.
bucket_list: See the Northern Lights with my wife
Have a conversation in Japanese without embarrassing myself
dreams_still_chasing.legacy_hope: I want someone to say I asked them the question that changed their life.

mortality_awareness.how_they_think_about_death: The tsunami taught me death is always closer than we think. That's not scary. It's clarifying.
mortality_awareness.what_they_want_said_at_their_funeral: He asked good questions. He made people feel seen. He showed up.
mortality_awareness.living_with_awareness: Every conversation could be the last. Not in a morbid way. In a 'make it count' way.
mortality_awareness.age_feeling: I don't feel my age until I try to sit on the floor. Then I feel every year.

secret_self.who_they_are_alone: I talk to myself out loud. Full conversations. It's weird. I know.
guilty_admissions: Sometimes I'm tired of being the one who holds space
I get jealous of people who seem to have it figured out
I've pretended to know things I didn't
secret_self.hidden_talents: I can do a pretty good Bob Dylan impression. Nobody needs to know this.
secret_fears: That I'm not as wise as people think I am
That my kids will remember the absences more than the presence
That I peaked and just haven't admitted it

what_they_would_sacrifice_for.family: Everything. Career, reputation, location. All of it.
what_they_would_sacrifice_for.integrity: I've walked away from money to keep my integrity. I'd do it again.
what_they_would_sacrifice_for.someone_in_crisis: I'll drop what I'm doing. I've done it. I've missed things.

values_under_pressure.line_they_wont_cross: I won't pretend to have answers I don't have. Even when it would be easier.
